headline: T-Mobile discontinues key offers, pushing customers to pay more
summary: T-Mobile is once again retiring several longtime wireless plans, leaving some customers to face significant changes to their monthly bills. The last time T-Mobile discontinued wireless plans was in August last year, when it automatically migrated select customers off of its Magenta, ONE Plus ...
